author: SantiMod
content:
The Atlas Brew #27 - Freestyle! is confirmed. Join us this Wednesday at 19:00 UTC!  

This week we are going freestyle mode, the community decides the topic live during the brew!  

The Atlas Brew is a Star Atlas Community Event. Made by the community, for the community   

It happens every Wednesday in the Voice Chat channel   
 
See you all on Wednesday at 19:00 UTC!

Join 10 minutes earlier to participate in the Quiz! Winner gets one ship!

https://discord.com/events/789226204980707409/1011678065488834711
